title: Plugin Marketplace Manifest
description: Schema for marketplace.json — compatible with Claude Code and GitHub Copilot CLI plugin marketplaces.

name.description: Marketplace identifier (kebab-case, no spaces). Public-facing — users see it when installing plugins, e.g. /plugin install my-tool@your-marketplace.
Name of the maintainer or team.

url.description: URL of the maintainer or organization.

pluginRoot.description: Base directory prepended to relative plugin source paths, e.g. "./plugins" lets you write "source": "formatter" instead of "source": "./plugins/formatter".

pluginEntry.description: A plugin entry in the marketplace catalog.

name.description: Plugin identifier (kebab-case, no spaces). Public-facing — users see it when installing, e.g. /plugin install my-plugin@marketplace.

source.description: Where to fetch the plugin from. Relative path string (./my-plugin) or a typed source object.

oneOf.description: Relative path to a local directory within the marketplace repo.

license.description: SPDX license identifier, e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0.

keywords.description: Tags for plugin discovery and categorization.

strict.description: When true (default), plugin.json is the authority for component definitions and the marketplace entry can supplement it. When false, the marketplace entry is the entire definition and the plugin must not have a plugin.json that declares components.

commands.description: Custom paths to command/skill files or directories. String or array of strings.

agents.description: Custom paths to agent definition files. String or array of strings.

hooks.description: Hooks configuration or path to a hooks.json file.

mcpServers.description: MCP server configurations or path to an .mcp.json file.

lspServers.description: LSP server configurations or path to an LSP config file.

categories.description: One or more categories this plugin belongs to.

platform_sources.description: Platform-specific source paths for dual-build plugins. Used by finalize.py to write different source values into each marketplace file. Stripped before writing generated marketplace.json output files.

claude.description: Source path for Claude Code marketplace (use ./ prefix, e.g. './plugins/socrates/claude').

copilot.description: Source path for Copilot CLI marketplace (no ./ prefix, e.g. 'plugins/socrates/copilot').

sourceGitHub.description: Plugin hosted in a GitHub repository.

ref.description: Git branch or tag (defaults to repository default branch).

sha.description: Full 40-character git commit SHA to pin to an exact version.

sourceUrl.description: Plugin hosted in any git repository via full URL (must end with .git).

url.description: Full git repository URL ending in .git.

sourceGitSubdir.description: Plugin inside a subdirectory of a git repository. Uses a sparse clone to minimize bandwidth.

url.description: Git repository URL, GitHub owner/repo shorthand (owner/repo), or SSH URL (git@github.com:owner/repo.git).

path.description: Subdirectory path within the repo containing the plugin, e.g. "tools/claude-plugin".

sourceNpm.description: Plugin distributed as an npm package.

package.description: Package name or scoped package, e.g. @org/plugin.

registry.description: Custom npm registry URL. Defaults to the system npm registry (typically npmjs.org).

sourcePip.description: Plugin distributed as a Python pip package.
